title: R3 Real Qrel Suite Schema
description: Schema for the R3 Real qrel suite. Companion to docs/worklogs/rag-r3-system-spec-v1.md §8 and docs/worklogs/rag-r3-corpus-v3-contract.md. Defines 6 evaluation cohorts (paraphrase_human, confusable_pairs, symptom_to_cause, mission_bridge, corpus_gap_probe, forbidden_neighbor). Seed qrels can be auto-generated from corpus v3 frontmatter expected_queries; production qrels are human-curated to break the alias-indexing circular validation that affected the 208q legacy gate.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Reserved 1 for v3 system Real qrel suite.

fixture_id.description: Identifier for this fixture (e.g. 'r3_real_v1', 'r3_real_v0_seed'). Used in trace artifacts to attribute measurements.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this fixture was authored or last updated.

authoring_method.description: How qrels were authored. 'auto_from_expected_queries' is allowed only for seed/scaffolding; cohorts paraphrase_human / corpus_gap_probe / forbidden_neighbor MUST NOT use this method.

cohort_distribution_target.description: Optional declaration of how many queries each cohort should have. Validation tooling checks the actual queries match these counts.

query_count.description: Optional explicit query count. When present, verification tooling must ensure it matches the actual length of queries.

query_id.description: Unique within the fixture. Suggested format: '<cohort>:<concept_or_topic>:<index>' (kebab-case + colons).

prompt.description: The query as a learner would type it. Korean queries written in Korean. Mixed queries kept as-typed.

reformulated_query.description: Optional corpus-friendly reformulation folded with prior-turn context when needed. Used by the Phase 9.1/9.4 dense retrieval path.

intent.description: Optional. Phase 1 spec §3.5 enumerates intent labels.

primary_paths.description: List of primary correct doc paths. corpus_gap_probe MAY have empty primary_paths (the system should respond 'not in corpus'). All other cohorts must have at least 1.

acceptable_paths.description: Docs that are acceptable answers but not the primary. Disjoint from primary_paths and forbidden_paths (enforced by validator).

forbidden_paths.description: Docs that must NOT appear in top-K. Required ≥ 1 for forbidden_neighbor cohort. Disjoint from primary_paths and acceptable_paths.

expected_concepts.description: concept_id refs that should be invoked by query understanding. Cross-checked against corpus catalog v3.

failure_focus.description: Free-form keyword tags describing what kind of failure this query stresses. Examples: 'paraphrase_robustness', 'beginner_primer', 'korean_alias', 'mission_term', 'confusable_routing'. Used by failure taxonomy classifier post-measurement.

mission_id.description: Optional. Required for cohort=mission_bridge. Specifies which Woowa mission context the query is bound to.

prior_turn.description: Optional multi-turn context. When set, simulates a follow-up query where prior_turn.primary_concept is the prior turn's resolved concept_id.

rationale.description: Optional human-readable explanation: why is this the primary doc? what makes the query hard? Used for review.
